title: Kev's TieredZ Modifiers
description: More Tieredz modifiers that support spell power and others!
body:
[![](https://imgur.com/qCEInxG.png)](https://pixeldreamstudios.net/) [![](https://imgur.com/GTZ8FbB.png)](https://pixeldreamstudios.net/) ✨ Features Galore ✨ ## 1.21.1: A total of 161+ new modifiers (including compats), dependent on [Tiered More](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tiered-more) and a total rewrite of existing modifiers (NO MORE NEGATIVES, ONLY POSITIVES)!~~~~ * Mace: 24 (4 for each tier) * Trident: 24 (4 for each tier) * Accessories: 5 * Armor: 18 (3 for each tier) * Melee: 12 (2 for each tier) * Ranged: 12 (2 for each tier) ## Compats: ### [Shyvv's Trickier Trials](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/shyvvs-trickier-trials) * Lance: 12 (2 for each tier) ### Spell Power Dependent mods (Spellblades & Such, Wizards, etc) * Spellblades: 12 (2 for each tier) * Magic (Wands and Staffs): 24 (4 for each tier) * Magic armor: 12 (2 for each tier) ### Druids Compat * Druids armor: 6 (1 of each each tier) ## Dependencies: * [Kev's Library](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/kevs-library) * [Tiered More](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tiered-more) * [Ranged Weapon API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ranged-weapon-api)
Spoiler
1.20.1 [NO LONGER SUPPORTED / DISCONTINUED]
A magical mod originally crafted for Fantasy MC, a total of 95+ new modifiers! Ensure a seamless experience by having all the required mods installed + more if you install the recommended mods. Exciting updates on the horizon! 🚀
Overhauled almost all original Tieredz modifiers using attributes from different mods
From v1.0.0: 47 new modifiers in total (wands/staves/ranged weapons/armour/swords) and 1 more tier to the modifiers!
• 8 Unique modifiers (2 staves, 2 wands, 3 swords, 1 armour)
• 8 Legendary modifiers (2 staves, 2 wands, 3 swords, 1 armour)
• 8 Epic modifiers (2 staves, 2 wands, 3 swords, 1 armour)
• 6 Rare modifiers (3 staves, 3 wands)
• 6 Uncommon modifiers (3 staves, 3 wands)
• 6 Common modifiers (3 staves, 3 wands)
• 4 Chaotic modifiers (2 swords, 2 bows)
From v1.5.0: (4 new dependency: Obscure API, Archers, Paladins & Priests, Mythic Metals)
• Added 3 new modifiers for P&P armors (1 Epic, 1 Legendary, 1 Unique)
• Added 14 new modifiers for claymore/great hammer/mace (3 Common, 3 Uncommon, 2 Rare, 2 Epic, 2 Legendary, 2 Unique)
• Added 14 new modifiers for wands/staves (3 Common, 3 Uncommon, 2 Rare, 2 Epic, 2 Legendary, 2 Unique)
• Added 12 new modifiers specifically for Archers' armors
• Added 12 new modifiers for all armors
From v2.0.0:
• Added 24 new melee modifiers
• Added Anti-Gravity, Aquatic, Swift to Boots
• Added Guardian, Shadowguard to Chestplates
The weights of all the tiers are changed to fit in another; the Chaotic tier 🌪️
🔧 Required Mods
• Spell Power Attributes
• Pufferfish's skills
• Tierify
• Obscure API
🌈 Recommended Optional Mods
• Spellblades and Such
• Simply Skills
• Mythic Metals
• Archers
• Paladins & Priests
• Wizards
• Reabsorption
